elements.title: lang::report_page_035_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_c.id,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       kbi_c.shortname,
       kbi_ca.name                             AS category,
       kbi_c.startdate,
       x.users,
       (kbi_ue.enrolled - x.users)             AS inactiveusers,
       kbi_ue.enrolled,
       kbi_cc.completed,
       x.timespend,
       x.visits,
       x.lastaccess,
       completed_activities,
       (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(kbi_u.firstname, ' ', kbi_u.lastname) SEPARATOR ', ')
        FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
               JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_ra.userid = kbi_u.id
               JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
        WHERE kbi_ctx.instanceid = kbi_c.id
          AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
          AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3) AS teacher
FROM mdl_course kbi_c
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_categories kbi_ca ON kbi_ca.id = kbi_c.category
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT course, COUNT(*) AS completed
                  FROM mdl_course_completions
                  WHERE timecompleted > 0
                    AND course = :courseid
                  GROUP BY course) cc ON kbi_cc.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_cc.course, COUNT(*) as completed_activities
                  FROM mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc
                         JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cc ON kbi_cc.id = kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid
                  WHERE 1 = 1
                    AND kbi_cmc.completionstate IN (1, 2)
                    AND kbi_cc.course = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_cc.course) compl ON compl.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_e.courseid, COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_ue.userid) AS enrolled
                  FROM mdl_enrol kbi_e
                         JOIN mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue ON kbi_ue.enrolid = kbi_e.id
                  WHERE 1 = 1
                    AND kbi_ue.status = 0
                    AND kbi_e.status = 0
                    AND kbi_e.courseid = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_e.courseid) ue ON kbi_ue.courseid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_t.courseid,
                         COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_t.userid) as users,
                         MAX(lastaccess)          AS lastaccess,
                         SUM(kbi_l.timespend)         AS timespend,
                         SUM(kbi_l.visits)            AS visits
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_t
                         JOIN mdl_local_kopere_bi_track_log kbi_l ON kbi_l.trackid = kbi_t.id
                  WHERE 1 = 1
                    AND kbi_t.courseid = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_t.courseid) x ON x.courseid = kbi_c.id
WHERE kbi_c.id > 1
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
